sentiment: Another model, another benchmark — the real frontier is the ground you don't cede.

stories.title: MAI-Code-1-Flash
stories.summary: Microsoft launched yet another coding model, adding to the growing pile of capable alternatives — each one sharpening the same question about what we're building toward.

stories.title: Gmail thinks I'm stupid, so I left
stories.summary: A developer abandoned Gmail because its AI features kept second-guessing their intent — a small act of autonomy in a landscape that increasingly assumes you want to be managed.

stories.title: AI outperforms law professors in Stanford Law study
stories.summary: Another benchmark falls — but benchmarks measure the exam, not the years of judgment that precede the answer.
